lastReleaseMessage: dashboard: writer emits standardized items-left and backlog item lists

barRaise.topFinding: YesAndApothecary stays healthy and parked at v1.0.2, feature-complete and on weekly-constellation-only cadence. The only movement since the 2026-07-01 pass is one commit (855935c) adding a portfolio turn-ending and Discord-webhook-naming block to CLAUDE.md; it touches no src, data, canonical doc, or public artifact, and today's canonical audit confirms zero product drift. All three version pills agree at v1.0.2, the tree is clean, no npm artifacts exist, and the only secret-shaped tracked file is the .example webhook stub. Three open items are deferred cosmetic/structural LOWs; nothing is actionable this run.
